subcodes.first_line: Though no letter was received from thee, yet is an answer being sent. In truth, thou hast been mentioned though no mention was made [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه از شما نرسید ولکن جواب ارسال میشود فی الحقیقه بی ذکر مذکور شدید
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
